text: The video materials were very poor , they did not cover all the aspects and the explanations were very brief . The course only contained a single project , which although fun , is not enough for learning a new language . After completing this course I feel that I don ' t really know Swift , but I can use it . After each week you have to complete a quiz . They should replace these quizzes with project , where you write real code . I took this course for free , but I wouldn ' t pay for it .
